days.summary: ByteDance Seed surfaced the clearest product artifact with Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview released on Arena alongside its new Seed Full-Duplex Speech LLM, signaling continued investment in multimodal and real-time voice systems. On the research side, "Introspective Diffusion Language Models" targets a core quality gap versus autoregressive models by introducing an introspective acceptance rate objective, while "ReSpinQuant" proposes more efficient layer-wise LLM quantization for lower-cost deployment. Anthropic’s reported Claude Mythos model is notable but remains weakly sourced and light on official technical detail.
